programme.desc: Liza Reizert negali pakęsti skrydžių lėktuvu, tačiau siaubingieji išgyvenimai, kurie jos laukia naktiniame skrydyje į Majamį, visiškai nesusiję su skrydžių baime. Vos tik lėktuvui pakilus, Lizos bendrakeleivis Džeksonas pareiškia turįs nužudyti turtingą ir įtakingą verslininką. Ir jis ketina priversti Lizą įvykdyti šią žmogžudystę. Jei moteris atsisakys, tai žus jos tėvas – žemėje samdomas žudikas tik ir laukia Džeksono skambučio. Liza negali niekur pabėgti nei padėti savo pasmerktam tėvui. Mirtinas pavojus iškilęs ir jai, ir visiems lėktuvo keleiviams. Paslaptingasis Džeksonas – visiškas padėties šeimininkas. Laikas nenumaldomai bėga, lėktuvas vis labiau artėja prie Majamio oro uosto, o herojė desperatiškai ieško išeities iš tiesiog beviltiškos situacijos.

programme.title: Išlikimas
programme.desc: Jungtinių Amerikos Valstijų vyriausybė į savo ambasadą Londone paskiria naują užsienio apsaugos tarnybos pareigūnę Keitę Ebot (akt. Mila Jovovich), kurios užduotis paprasta - iškilus abejotinai situacijai nuspręsti vizos suteikimo ar nesuteikimo klausimą ir tokiu būdu sustabdyti teroristų patekimą į Jungtines Amerikos Valstijas. Tačiau po vieno savo sprendimo Keitė tampa samdomo žudiko Nešo, pravarde Laikrodininkas (akt. Pierce Brosnan), taikiniu ir privalo sustabdyti gresiantį stambaus masto teroristinį išpuolį, galintį nusinešti milijonus gyvybių.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Nuostabioji Jennifer Garner, žiūrovams pažįstama iš filmų "Perl Harboras" ir "Drąsiaširdis", šioje juostoje įkūnijo stiprią, paslaptingą ir seksualią heroję - mirtiną jėgos ir grakštumo derinį. Režisierius Robas Bowmanas dirbo prie garsiojo serial "X failai", tad ir šioje istorijoje netrūks mistikos, paslapties ir siaubo elementų. J. Garner herojė Elektra nutraukia visus ryšius su likusiu pasauliu ir pradeda gyventi kaip atsiskyrėlė. Tačiau netikėtai susiklosčius aplinkybėms, ji priversta rinktis… Ar mergina nugalės troškimą atkeršyti už tėvų mirtį?

programme.title: Nauja duktė
programme.desc: Dviejų Oskarų savininkas Kevinas Costneris vaidina vienišą tėvą ir rašytoją Džoną Džeimsą, kuris su dukra ir sūnumi atsikrausto į atokų namą Pietų Karolinoje. Čia jiems priklauso ir indėnų pylimas, kuris itin žavi Džono dukterį Luisą. Neįprasti garsai ant stogo ir gretimame miške, dingusi katė ir sesers vaikščiojimas per miegus itin gąsdina mažąjį Semą. Kai Luisa ima vis dažniau užsibūti prie piliakalnio, o namo grįžta visa purvina, nerimas apima ir Džoną. Į kokį keistą užkeiktą kraštą jie atsikraustė? Rašytojas pradeda aiškintis buvusio šeimininko ir visų valdų istoriją.

programme.title: Kai skambina nepažįstamasis
programme.desc: Paauglė Džil dirba aukle. Šįkart ji saugo mažylius atokiame name kalnuose. Vaikai jau miega, durys užrakintos, signalizacija įjungta, galima ramiai pasižvalgyti po didelį, gražų būstą. Netikėtai suskamba jos mobilusis. Po kiek laiko skambutis pasikartoja. Nepažįstamojo skambučiai sukelia Džil paniką. Dar didesnis siaubas apima, kai ji supranta, jog skambinama iš kažkurios patalpos name. Kokie nepažįstamojo kėslai? Režisieriaus Simono Westo siaubo trileris su Camilla Belle , Tommy'iu Flanagan , Katie Cassidy ir kt.

programme.title: Džonas Vikas
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves'o vaidinamas Džonas Vikas gyvena paprastą ir tylų gyvenimą. Vienišas jo dienas praskaidrina mielo šunelio draugija ir pasivažinėjimai kolekciniu "Mustangu". Vieną iš tokių dienų, sustojus pasipildyti degalų atokioje degalinėje, Džono automobilis patraukia nelabai garbingų vyrukų dėmesį. Į vieno iš jų klausimą "kiek kainuoja?" atsakęs - "neparduodama", Džonas padaro klaidą. Svetimo gero užsigeidusi gauja paseka Džoną iki namų ir, sulaukę nakties, įsibrauna vidun. Sumušę šeimininką ir pasiėmę automobilio raktelius, chuliganai tuo nepasitenkina - demonstruodami savo galią, jie dar užmuša ir mylimą Džono šunį, dovanotą jam mirštančios žmonos. Atvarę mašiną savo bosui, išdidūs ir besidžiaugiantys savo sėkme vyrukai netrukus sužino, kad prie atokios degalinės klaidą padarė ne nepažįstamasis su "Mustangu", atsisakęs parduoti mašiną, o jie patys. Dar didesnė klaida buvo įsibrauti į nepažįstamojo namus, o užvis didžiausia (ir kvailiausia) iš klaidų buvo šuns pribaigimas. Situacijoje nesigaudantiems savo "torpedoms" bosas paaiškina (kumščių pagalba taip pat), kad jie užkabino ne šiaip eilinį vyruką, o legendinį žudiką Džoną Viką. Bosas nerimauja ne be reikalo. Atsitiktinių nusikaltėlių įžūlumo įsiutintas Džonas iš slėptuvės išsitraukia seniai praėjusių dienų darbo įrankius ir išsirengia į karo žygį. Sulig kiekvienu šūviu vis labiau artėdamas prie savo šuns žudikų, Džonas nesustos prieš jokią kliūtį. Nelaimingieji automobilio vagys netrukus suvokia, kad nuo Džono Viko įniršio jų niekas neapsaugos.

programme.title: Klyksmas: antroji dalis
programme.desc: Praėjus dvejiems metams po pirmosios žmogžudysčių serijos, naujas psichopatas apsivelka Vaiduoklio kostiumą ir prasideda nauja žmogžudysčių virtinė.

programme.title: Pakartota žmogžudystė
programme.desc: Moteris, apkaltinta savo vyro nužudymu, įtaria, kad jis vis dar gyvas; kadangi ji jau buvo teisiama už šį nusikaltimą, ji negali būti pakartotinai teisiama, jei jį suras ir nužudys.

programme.title: Blogas policininkas
programme.desc: Jis - policijos detektyvas, laisvai interpretuojantis įstatymą. Jis vienodai aistringai tiria žiaurų nusikaltimą ir ieško dar vienos dozės, kuri padeda numalšinti stiprų nugaros skausmą. Nepamainoma intuicija apdovanotas detektyvas išsitraukia ginklą dažniau nei policijos ženklelį. Jo ir taip ne rožėmis klotą kelią dar labiau komplikuoja santykiai su aukštos klasės prostitute. Palaipsniui jų istorija vis labiau įsuka į aistros ir pavojų verpetą...

programme.title: Svaiginantis aukštis
programme.desc: Kai kopimas į didelį aukštį pakrypsta netinkama linkme, geriausi draugai Beki ir Hanteris įstringa 2000 pėdų aukščio televizijos bokšto viršuje.

programme.title: Drugelis
programme.desc: Vienišas našlys, kolekcionuojantis drugelius, savo automobilyje randa devynmetę kaimynų mergaitę.

programme.title: Griaustinio dienos
programme.desc: Iš D.Britanijos kilęs režisierius Tony Scottas (tas pats, kuris užsimušė nušokęs nuo tilto) 1990 m. sukūrė ryškią, triukšmingą, kvapą gniaužiančią istoriją apie sportą ir meilę, pavadinimu "Griaustinio dienos". Šioje juostoje vaidina moterų magnetas Tomas Cruise'as ir viena garsiausių amerikiečių-australų kino aktorių Nicole Kidman. Jaunas automobilių lenktynininkas Koulas Triklis ne iš karto tampa čempionu. Vadovaujamas reiklaus ir išmintingo vadovo Hario Hogo, vaikinas išlaiko visus likimo išbandymus, nugali visas kliūtis ir sėkmingai dalyvauja automobilių lenktynėse. O kartu jis užkariauja su šiuo sportu nieko bendro neturinčios, seksualios rudaplaukės gydytojos Kler Levickį širdį. Gera kinematografija, puikus montažas ir pirmo ryškumo Holivudo žvaigždės - puikūs argumentai pasižiūrėti šį filmą.

programme.title: Paranoja
programme.desc: Namų arešto sąlygomis gyvenantis paauglys įsitikina, kad jo kaimynas yra serijinis žudikas.

programme.title: Išlikimas
programme.desc: Jungtinių Amerikos Valstijų vyriausybė į savo ambasadą Londone paskiria naują užsienio apsaugos tarnybos pareigūnę Keitę Ebot (akt. Mila Jovovich), kurios užduotis paprasta - iškilus abejotinai situacijai nuspręsti vizos suteikimo ar nesuteikimo klausimą ir tokiu būdu sustabdyti teroristų patekimą į Jungtines Amerikos Valstijas. Tačiau po vieno savo sprendimo Keitė tampa samdomo žudiko Nešo, pravarde Laikrodininkas (akt. Pierce Brosnan), taikiniu ir privalo sustabdyti gresiantį stambaus masto teroristinį išpuolį, galintį nusinešti milijonus gyvybių.

programme.title: Žvaigždžių kelias: atpildas
programme.desc: Įmonė nukreipiama į Romulų gimtąjį Romulanų pasaulį, nes jie nori derėtis dėl taikos sutarties, tačiau kapitonas Pikardas ir jo įgula aptinka rimtą grėsmę Federacijai.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Fantastinis veiksmo filmas, nukeliantis 400 metų į ateitį. Žemės planetoje paslaptinga liga išguldė daugumą gyventojų. Liko tik vienas, nepaprastai gerai apsaugotas Bregnos miestas, kurį valdo mokslininkų kongresas. Istorijos centre – Aeon Flux, paslaptinga ir skrupulų neturinti maištininkų atstovė, kurios užduotis – nužudyti miesto vadovą. Vykdydama ją, žudikė sužino ne vieną paslaptį.

programme.title: Svaiginantis aukštis
programme.desc: Kai kopimas į didelį aukštį pakrypsta netinkama linkme, geriausi draugai Beki ir Hanteris įstringa 2000 pėdų aukščio televizijos bokšto viršuje.

programme.title: Griaustinio garsas
programme.desc: Kelionės laiku 2055 m. tampa realybe! Dabar dinozaurus gali medžioti visi, tačiau vienas neatsargus žingsnis pasivaikščiojant praeityje visiškai pakeičia dabartį...

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Fantastinis veiksmo filmas, nukeliantis 400 metų į ateitį. Žemės planetoje paslaptinga liga išguldė daugumą gyventojų. Liko tik vienas, nepaprastai gerai apsaugotas Bregnos miestas, kurį valdo mokslininkų kongresas. Istorijos centre – Aeon Flux, paslaptinga ir skrupulų neturinti maištininkų atstovė, kurios užduotis – nužudyti miesto vadovą. Vykdydama ją, žudikė sužino ne vieną paslaptį.

programme.title: Palikti vandenyne
programme.desc: Tikra istorija pagrįstas filmas apie du narus, atsitiktinai įstrigusius vandenyse, kuriuose veisiasi rykliai, kai juos palieka ekskursijų laivas.

programme.title: Klyksmas. 3-ioji dalis
programme.desc: Šioje trečiojoje amerikiečių siaubo filmų franšizės dalyje Sidni lankosi "Stab 3" filmavimo aikštelėje po to, kai jos motinos nuotraukos tampa Holivude vykdomų serijinių žmogžudysčių įkalčiu.

programme.title: Šiaudiniai šunys
programme.desc: Režisierius Rodas Lurie'is nufilmavo naują klasikinio trilerio versiją. Holivudo pora sugrįžta į gimtąjį miestą, kur gimsta nesantaika su vietos gyventojais.

programme.title: Synecdoche, New York
programme.desc: Theater director Caden Cotard is mounting a new play. Fresh off of a successful production of Death of a Salesman, he has traded in the suburban blue-hairs and regional theater of Schenectady for the cultured audiences and bright footlights of Broadway. Armed with a MacArthur grant and determined to create a piece of brutal realism and honesty, something into which he can put his whole self, he gathers an ensemble cast into a warehouse in Manhattan's theater district. He directs them in a celebration of the mundane, instructing each to live out their constructed lives in a small mock-up of the city outside. As the city inside the warehouse grows, Caden's own life veers wildly off the tracks. The shadow of his ex-wife Adele, a celebrated painter who left him years ago for Germany's art scene, sneers at him from every corner. Somewhere in Berlin, his daughter Olive is growing up under the questionable guidance of Adele's friend, Maria. He's helplessly driving his marriage to actress ...

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy starring Earl Cave (son of singer Nick) as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum, in Simon Bird's (The Inbetweeners) debut feature in the director's chair. Daniel (Cave) is all set for six weeks in Florida with his dad and his dad's pregnant wife, Bernie. The weather will be fantastic, and he'll get to drive his father's MG convertible. Meanwhile, his mum (Monica Dolan) won't let him drive the Vauxhall Astra and she never gets her own cake, but instead nicks bits of his. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Can a Metallica-loving, black-clad teenager with Tippexed emblems on his shoes have any fun with a middle-aged librarian who wears comfortable sandals? Well, she is his mum... Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: Winner of the Academy Award for Best Actress, Dame Helen Mirren gives a spellbinding performance in THE QUEEN, the provocative story behind one of the most public tragedies of our time - the sudden death of Princess Diana. In the wake of Diana's death, the very private and tradition-bound Queen Elizabeth II (Mirren) finds herself in conflict with the new Prime Minister, the slickly modern and image-conscious Tony Blair (Michael Sheen). THE QUEEN takes you inside the private chambers of the Royal Family and the British government for a captivating look at a vulnerable human being in her darkest hour, as a nation grieving for its People's Princess waits to see what its leaders will do.

programme.title: The Silent Revolution
programme.desc: A group of twelfth-grade pupils in East Germany decide to show their solidarity with the victims of the 1956 Hungarian uprising by staging two minutes of silence during lessons.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: For thirty years, three French-Algerian sisters have been hoping to find their brother who was abducted by their father, and hidden in newly decolonized Algeria. Their relationship is shaken when the eldest decides to write a play based on the traumatizing events of their childhood and they learn that their father is dying and decide to go to Algeria to seize their last opportunity to have him reveal where their brother is.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: The Time of Secrets
programme.desc: Marcel Pagnol embarks on his last summer vacation before high school and returns to his beloved hills in Provence. His summer of boyhood adventures becomes one of first loves and secrets.

programme.title: Summer Hours
programme.desc: Two brothers and a sister witness the disappearance of their childhood memories when they must relinquish the family belongings to ensure their deceased mother's succession.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Four children dream of escaping the tedium of a summer holiday with their mother. When finally given permission to camp on their own on an island in the middle of a vast lake in the Lake District, they are overjoyed. But when they get there they discover they may not be alone. The battle for ownership of a lonely island teaches them the skills of survival, the value of friendship and the importance of holding your nerve. Based on the novel by Arthur Ransome.

programme.title: A Girl Missing
programme.desc: A home-care nurse's relationship with the family she has spent years working for is threatened when her nephew is arrested for kidnapping their daughter.

programme.title: Delicatessen
programme.desc: Dark comedy. French dark comedy, produced in 1991. In a post-apocalyptic society where meat is scarce, the tenants of a deserted apartment building organise cannibalistic feasts using as victims the butcher's helpers.

programme.title: The Swindle
programme.desc: Betty and Victor are scam artists; when Betty brings in Maurice, a treasurer of a multinational company who is due to transfer five million francs, Betty suspects that he plans to steal that money.

programme.title: Vera Drake
programme.desc: Vera Drake is a selfless woman who is completely dedicated to her working class family who love her. He spends his days adoring them, and also takes care of his sick neighbor and old mother. And he secretly visits women and helps them have abortions. Something like that was illegal in England in the 1950s. Vera sees it as helping women in need, and she does it with a smile on her face and words of encouragement. However, when the authorities discover her, Vera's world and family life quickly unravel.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: A charming young woman, Isabelle, shares her life with her boyfriend Pierre and is as in love as one can be. But, when he proposes, she hesitates. She is reminded of her family's curse: all of their first marriages always end up in divorce. In hopes of staying by Pierre's side for the rest of her life, Isabelle comes up with a perfect plan. She will first marry a stranger and divorce him, thus making it her first marriage. And after the curse has been fulfilled, she will enjoy her second marriage with Pierre.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: That's What I Am
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story set in 1965 that follows 12-year-old Andy Nichol (Chase Ellison), a bright student who, like most kids his age, will do anything to avoid conflict for fear of suffering overwhelming ridicule and punishment from his junior high school peers. Everyone's favorite teacher, Mr. Simon (Ed Harris), pairs Andy with the school's biggest outcast and social pariah, Stanley, aka "Big G" (Alexander Walters), on a critical term project. Sporting thick orange hair, a head too big for his body and ears too big for his head, "Big G" has been the object of ridicule since grade school. Before long, Andy will learn that there was truly a method behind Mr. Simon's madness as to why he teamed these two up. As the story unfolds, Mr. Simon finds himself the target of a malicious rumor after Principal Kelner (Amy Madigan) suspends a school bully for brutally beating up a female classmate whom he thinks has "cooties.".

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: Meryl Streep won both a Best Actress Bafta and Oscar in the titular role of director Phyllida's biopic of the former Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher, who died recently. Writer Abi Morgan's script follows Thatcher's rise from modest beginnings to her role as Prime Minister, framed by a contemporary imagining of her later years, largely spent outside public scrutiny. The octogenarian Thatcher (Streep) is prompted to reminisce about her life and rise to power, as well as recalling her closest relationships, in particular that with her now-deceased husband Denis (Jim Broadbent). The young Margaret's (Alexandra Roach) ascendance in politics, inspired by her father, begins in the late 40s and takes her to the landmark moment in British history when she leads the Conservative Party to victory in the General Election of 1979, becoming the country's first female Prime Minister. Significant moments in recent history follow - from the Falklands War to the Miner's Strike and the Brighton Grand Hotel bombing - until finally, in 1990, she resigns and leaves 10 Downing Street. While it's impossible to completely eschew Thatcher's politics in a film of this nature - and politicians past and present had much to say on the film's portrait of the PM - the dramatisation is predominantly focused on the story of a woman who smashed gender and class barriers in a male-dominated world; and is ultimately an intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman. Also starring Olivia Colman (as Carol Thatcher), Harry Lloyd (as a young Denis), Anthony Head (as Geoffrey Howe), Richard E Grant (as Michael Heseltine) and Roger Allam (as Gordon Reece). A Film4 co-production.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: Monty Wildhorn, an alcoholic novelist of Westerns, has lost his drive. His nephew pushes him to summer in quiet Belle Isle. He begrudgingly befriends a newly single mom and her 3 girls who help him find the inspiration to write again.

programme.title: The Graduate
programme.desc: Classic Oscar-winning comedy drama. Disillusioned graduate Benjamin Braddock is urged by his family to enter a business career and settle down after college, but instead he finds himself seduced by Mrs Robinson, a friend of his parents. He tries to extricate himself from the affair when he falls in love with Mrs Robinson's daughter, but finds that his own actions may have sealed his fate. Featuring the music of Simon and Garfunkel.

programme.title: Certified Copy
programme.desc: Drama. French drama, produced in 2010. While in Tuscany to promote his latest book, a middle-aged British writer meets a French gallery owner woman who is also a fan of his books and they set off on a tour of Tuscany.

programme.title: Louise Violet
programme.desc: France. End of the 19th century. Louise Violet, a Parisian teacher, is sent on a mission to the French countryside. She has to impose the free, compulsory and secular school of the Republic.

programme.title: The Wait
programme.desc: Amidst the large rooms of an old villa marked by time, Anna, emerging from a sudden bereavement, spends her days in solitude. The rugged and beautiful Sicilian countryside surrounds the house and isolates her while the fog, which is slowly climbing the slopes of Mount Etna, prevents the eye seeing any distance. Only the footsteps of Pietro, the handyman, break the silence. And all of a sudden Jeanne appears, a young woman who claims to be the girlfriend of Giuseppe, Anna's son. He invited her to Sicily to spend a few days' holiday together. Anna was unaware of Jeanne's existence. And Giuseppe is not there. But his things are all there, in his room. Soon, very soon he will return, is what Anna says, unable to reveal a truth that for her cannot be spoken. The days pass, the two women slowly get to know each other, and together they begin to wait for Easter, when Giuseppe will finally come home, and a great traditional procession will be held in the village.

programme.title: The Fabulous Patars
programme.desc: After the death of his beloved spouse, Denis, a loving father, is struggling with the education of his two daughters, Jenine and Mercredi, and his two jobs. When he forgets to pick Mercredi up from school, the director calls the social services. Severine, a social investigator, forces Denis to attend parenting classes, under penalty of withdrawing the custody of his daughters….

programme.title: A Woman in Winter
programme.desc: An astronomer enters into a destructive affair with a photographer.

programme.title: Gainsbourg: A Heroic Life
programme.desc: Lucien Ginsburg, a rebellious French Jewish boy with a grotesque imagination, hates playing the piano like his father, a bar professional, and manages to be admitted to Montmartre Academy as a painter, where he befriends an SS officer who helps him survive the occupation. After the war, he chooses to become a performing artist and adopts the stage name Serge Gainsbourg. His unorthodox songs bring him success, even his parents's approval, and lots of lovers, yet his marriages are all utter failures.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: A new comedy from writer/director David E. Talbert (Baggage Claim) and producer Will Packer (Ride Along, Think Like a Man series, This Christmas), Almost Christmas tells the festive story of a beloved patriarch who asks his family for one gift this holiday season: to get along. If they can honor that wish and spend five days under the same roof without killing one another, it will be a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: Pride
programme.desc: PRIDE is an inspirational comedy based on remarkable true events. It's the summer of 1984 - Margaret Thatcher is in power and the National Union of Mineworkers (NUM) is on strike. At the Gay Pride March in London, a group of gay and lesbian activists decides to raise money to support the families of the striking miners. But there is a problem. The Union seems embarrassed to receive their support. But the activists are not deterred. They decide to ignore the Union and go direct to the miners. They identify a mining village in deepest Wales and set off in a mini bus to make their donation in person. And so begins the extraordinary story of how two wholly different communities come together for a common cause.

programme.title: Bhaji on the Beach
programme.desc: A delightful story, simply told, about a group of Asian women, both young and old, who decide to escape from the pressures of their various lives for a hilarious trip to the beacon of Northern sunshine - Blackpool. With Sarita Khajuria, Lalita Ahmed, Shaheen Khan. Director: Gurinder Chadha, written by Meera Syal.

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy starring Earl Cave (son of singer Nick) as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum, in Simon Bird's (The Inbetweeners) debut feature in the director's chair. Daniel (Cave) is all set for six weeks in Florida with his dad and his dad's pregnant wife, Bernie. The weather will be fantastic, and he'll get to drive his father's MG convertible. Meanwhile, his mum (Monica Dolan) won't let him drive the Vauxhall Astra and she never gets her own cake, but instead nicks bits of his. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Can a Metallica-loving, black-clad teenager with Tippexed emblems on his shoes have any fun with a middle-aged librarian who wears comfortable sandals? Well, she is his mum... Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: For thirty years, three French-Algerian sisters have been hoping to find their brother who was abducted by their father, and hidden in newly decolonized Algeria. Their relationship is shaken when the eldest decides to write a play based on the traumatizing events of their childhood and they learn that their father is dying and decide to go to Algeria to seize their last opportunity to have him reveal where their brother is.

programme.title: That's What I Am
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story set in 1965 that follows 12-year-old Andy Nichol (Chase Ellison), a bright student who, like most kids his age, will do anything to avoid conflict for fear of suffering overwhelming ridicule and punishment from his junior high school peers. Everyone's favorite teacher, Mr. Simon (Ed Harris), pairs Andy with the school's biggest outcast and social pariah, Stanley, aka "Big G" (Alexander Walters), on a critical term project. Sporting thick orange hair, a head too big for his body and ears too big for his head, "Big G" has been the object of ridicule since grade school. Before long, Andy will learn that there was truly a method behind Mr. Simon's madness as to why he teamed these two up. As the story unfolds, Mr. Simon finds himself the target of a malicious rumor after Principal Kelner (Amy Madigan) suspends a school bully for brutally beating up a female classmate whom he thinks has "cooties.".

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: The Time of Secrets
programme.desc: Marcel Pagnol embarks on his last summer vacation before high school and returns to his beloved hills in Provence. His summer of boyhood adventures becomes one of first loves and secrets.

programme.title: Summer Hours
programme.desc: Two brothers and a sister witness the disappearance of their childhood memories when they must relinquish the family belongings to ensure their deceased mother's succession.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Four children dream of escaping the tedium of a summer holiday with their mother. When finally given permission to camp on their own on an island in the middle of a vast lake in the Lake District, they are overjoyed. But when they get there they discover they may not be alone. The battle for ownership of a lonely island teaches them the skills of survival, the value of friendship and the importance of holding your nerve. Based on the novel by Arthur Ransome.

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: Biopic chronicling the three-month period in 1965 which saw Dr Martin Luther King Jr lead a march from Selma to Montgomery. Despite the passing of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 which outlawed segregation, many black people still found they were being denied fundamental rights. In the face of extreme opposition from many who were determined to undermine their efforts, King and his fellow campaigners endured damaging smears and shocking physical attacks on the path to securing equal voting rights.

programme.title: Croupier
programme.desc: Mike Hodges' film was a surprise sleeper, ignored in this country until it was lauded in the States. Clive Owen plays Jack Manfred, a croupier who works by night and writes by day. His girlfriend Marion (Gina McKee) becomes increasingly frustrated by his seemingly aimless life, but he becomes focused when glamorous South African Jani de Villiers (Alex Kingston) arrives in his casino, and then his bed, with a plan to defraud the house. But is she playing with a straight deck of cards?

programme.title: Conviction
programme.desc: Sam Rockwell, Hilary Swank and Melissa Leo star in Tony Goldwyn's fact-based drama. When Kenny Waters (Rockwell) is jailed for murder, his elder sister Betty Anne (Swank) is incredulous. She knows that he has an unruly streak to his character and that his temper occasionally flares violently, but she's certain he's not capable of the brutal murder of an old woman. Nancy Taylor (Leo), the officer in charge of the case, sees things very differently and, despite there being only the slimmest of circumstantial evidence and hearsay to link Kenny to the murder, he is charged and subsequently found guilty. However, over the course of the following decade, advances in forensics and Betty Anne's transformation, through hard study, into a campaigning lawyer combine to offer Kenny hope. As long as the police kept all the evidence and records relating to his case... With Minnie Driver and Juliette Lewis. Film4 premiere.

programme.title: Lolita
programme.desc: Controversial adaptation of Vladimir Nabokov's novel about a man's obsession with a 13-year-old girl. In an American town in the late 1940s, a European professor takes up residence in the home of a woman and her daughter. Although eventually marrying the mother, he harbours a secret desire for the young girl. And when the mother dies, the middle-aged man's infatuation with the teenager runs amok - with shocking consequences.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: During France's belle époque before World War I, elegant cars, mansions, and servants defined the lives of les grandes horizontals, the courtesans of kings and millionaires. One of the most successful, Lea de Lonval, is approaching a certain age when an older associate, Charlotte Peloux, asks Lea to take on her 19 year old son, whom Lea has called Chéri since he was a child. They become lovers and, to their surprise, the relationship lasts six years. When it ends abruptly with a marriage his mother arranges to the daughter of another courtesan, Lea finds herself miserable.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: A charming young woman, Isabelle, shares her life with her boyfriend Pierre and is as in love as one can be. But, when he proposes, she hesitates. She is reminded of her family's curse: all of their first marriages always end up in divorce. In hopes of staying by Pierre's side for the rest of her life, Isabelle comes up with a perfect plan. She will first marry a stranger and divorce him, thus making it her first marriage. And after the curse has been fulfilled, she will enjoy her second marriage with Pierre.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: Monty Wildhorn, an alcoholic novelist of Westerns, has lost his drive. His nephew pushes him to summer in quiet Belle Isle. He begrudgingly befriends a newly single mom and her 3 girls who help him find the inspiration to write again.

programme.title: The Graduate
programme.desc: Classic Oscar-winning comedy drama. Disillusioned graduate Benjamin Braddock is urged by his family to enter a business career and settle down after college, but instead he finds himself seduced by Mrs Robinson, a friend of his parents. He tries to extricate himself from the affair when he falls in love with Mrs Robinson's daughter, but finds that his own actions may have sealed his fate. Featuring the music of Simon and Garfunkel.

programme.title: Certified Copy
programme.desc: Drama. French drama, produced in 2010. While in Tuscany to promote his latest book, a middle-aged British writer meets a French gallery owner woman who is also a fan of his books and they set off on a tour of Tuscany.

programme.title: Louise Violet
programme.desc: France. End of the 19th century. Louise Violet, a Parisian teacher, is sent on a mission to the French countryside. She has to impose the free, compulsory and secular school of the Republic.

programme.title: The Wait
programme.desc: Amidst the large rooms of an old villa marked by time, Anna, emerging from a sudden bereavement, spends her days in solitude. The rugged and beautiful Sicilian countryside surrounds the house and isolates her while the fog, which is slowly climbing the slopes of Mount Etna, prevents the eye seeing any distance. Only the footsteps of Pietro, the handyman, break the silence. And all of a sudden Jeanne appears, a young woman who claims to be the girlfriend of Giuseppe, Anna's son. He invited her to Sicily to spend a few days' holiday together. Anna was unaware of Jeanne's existence. And Giuseppe is not there. But his things are all there, in his room. Soon, very soon he will return, is what Anna says, unable to reveal a truth that for her cannot be spoken. The days pass, the two women slowly get to know each other, and together they begin to wait for Easter, when Giuseppe will finally come home, and a great traditional procession will be held in the village.

programme.title: The Fabulous Patars
programme.desc: After the death of his beloved spouse, Denis, a loving father, is struggling with the education of his two daughters, Jenine and Mercredi, and his two jobs. When he forgets to pick Mercredi up from school, the director calls the social services. Severine, a social investigator, forces Denis to attend parenting classes, under penalty of withdrawing the custody of his daughters….

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: Beauty And the Beast
programme.desc: A widowed merchant moves to the countryside with his six children after going bankrupt. His youngest daughter, Belle, is the only one happy with the change. When the merchant's lost ship is found, he plans to reclaim his assets. On the way, he encounters the Beast's magical domain, where his needs are met. However, he is caught picking a rose and must return to the castle or his family will be killed. Feeling responsible, Belle offers herself in her father's place.

programme.title: Dark River
programme.desc: Ruth Wilson stars in this acclaimed drama from writer/director Clio Barnard (The Selfish Giant), inspired by Rose Tremain's novel Trespass. Following the death of her father, Alice (Wilson) returns home to Yorkshire for the first time in 15 years, to claim the tenancy of the family farm she believes is rightfully hers. There she encounters her older brother Joe (Mark Stanley), a man she barely recognizes, worn down by years of struggling to keep the farm going whilst caring for their sick father. Joe is thrown by Alice's sudden arrival and angered by her claim. Battling to regain control in a fraught and fragile situation, Alice must confront traumatic memories and family betrayals to find a way to restore the farm and salvage the bond with her brother before both are irrevocably lost. Co-starring Sean Bean. Co-funded by Film4. Network Premiere.

programme.title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
programme.desc: In late 18th-century Brittany, painter Marianne is commissioned by an affluent countess to paint a portrait of her sheltered daughter Héloïse so that she can be appraised by a prospective suitor in Milan. A previous attempt couldn't be completed as Héloïse refused to pose for the artist, so Marianne has to finish the portrait in secret by pretending to be a companion for Héloïse, who is unhappy at the prospect of marriage to a stranger. In French with English subtitles.

programme.title: Now or Never
programme.desc: Everything seems to be going right for a part-time piano teacher, Juliette. She's the mother of two fun-loving and well behaved boys, while her husband, Charlie, has a finance job that's allowed them to build a beautiful country house they'll be moving into next month. But when Charlie gets canned from work and can no longer pay his mortgage payments, the creditors quickly threaten to repossess the property, leaving his family stranded in their cramped Paris apartment. Only a few days later, Juliette gets her purse snatched by a brooding, attractive street thug named Manu. When she's called to identify him in a police lineup, she decides to let him go, only to solicit his help in her scheme to steal a half-million Euros from a local bank.

programme.title: Lost Holiday
programme.desc: A New York social worker finds herself embroiled in the kidnapping of a Washington DC socialite.

programme.title: The Swindle
programme.desc: Betty and Victor are scam artists; when Betty brings in Maurice, a treasurer of a multinational company who is due to transfer five million francs, Betty suspects that he plans to steal that money.

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy starring Earl Cave (son of singer Nick) as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum, in Simon Bird's (The Inbetweeners) debut feature in the director's chair. Daniel (Cave) is all set for six weeks in Florida with his dad and his dad's pregnant wife, Bernie. The weather will be fantastic, and he'll get to drive his father's MG convertible. Meanwhile, his mum (Monica Dolan) won't let him drive the Vauxhall Astra and she never gets her own cake, but instead nicks bits of his. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Can a Metallica-loving, black-clad teenager with Tippexed emblems on his shoes have any fun with a middle-aged librarian who wears comfortable sandals? Well, she is his mum... Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.

programme.title: The Painted Veil
programme.desc: In the 1920s a young English couple--Walter a middle class doctor and Kitty an upper-class woman--get married for the wrong reasons and relocate to Shanghai where she falls in love with someone else. When he uncovers her infidelity in an act of vengeance he accepts a job in a remote village in China ravaged by a deadly epidemic and takes her along. Their journey brings meaning to their relationship and gives them purpose in one of the most remote and beautiful places on earth.

programme.title: The Time of Secrets
programme.desc: Marcel Pagnol embarks on his last summer vacation before high school and returns to his beloved hills in Provence. His summer of boyhood adventures becomes one of first loves and secrets.

programme.title: Summer Hours
programme.desc: Two brothers and a sister witness the disappearance of their childhood memories when they must relinquish the family belongings to ensure their deceased mother's succession.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: Biopic chronicling the three-month period in 1965 which saw Dr Martin Luther King Jr lead a march from Selma to Montgomery. Despite the passing of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 which outlawed segregation, many black people still found they were being denied fundamental rights. In the face of extreme opposition from many who were determined to undermine their efforts, King and his fellow campaigners endured damaging smears and shocking physical attacks on the path to securing equal voting rights.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: Thunderpants
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy's amazing ability to break wind leads him first to fame and then to death row before it helps him to fulfil his ambition of becoming an astronaut.

programme.title: Is Anybody There?
programme.desc: Bittersweet tale of an unusual friendship, starring Michael Caine as retired magician Clarence. Edward hates living in the old people's home run by his parents. His only interest is an obsession with ghosts, death and the afterlife. Until, that is, the arrival of reluctant new resident, Clarence - a retired magician with a liberating streak of anarchy. Together the odd couple overcome their personal drawbacks.

programme.title: Iris
programme.desc: When the young Iris Murdoch meets fellow student John Bayley at Somerville College, Oxford, he is a naive virgin easily flummoxed by her libertine spirit, arch personality, and obvious artistic talent. Decades later, little has changed and the couple keeps house, with John doting on his more famous wife. When Iris begins experiencing forgetfulness and dementia, however, the devoted John struggles with hopelessness and frustration, and becomes her caretaker, as his wife's mind deteriorates from the ravages of Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: Shopping
programme.desc: The story of a city where the underclasses' sport of choice is ram-raiding, an exciting game in which stolen cars are driven through shop windows to aid large-scale looting before the police arrive.

programme.title: Driveways
programme.desc: Kathy (Hong Chau), a single mother, travels with her shy eight-year-old son Cody (Lucas Jaye) to Kathy's late sister's house which they plan to clean and sell. As Kathy realizes how little she knew about her sister, Cody develops an unlikely friendship with Del (Brian Dennehy), the Korean War vet and widower who lives next door. Over the course of a summer, and with Del's encouragement, Cody develops the courage to come out of his shell and, along with his mother, finds a new place to call home.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: A new comedy from writer/director David E. Talbert (Baggage Claim) and producer Will Packer (Ride Along, Think Like a Man series, This Christmas), Almost Christmas tells the festive story of a beloved patriarch who asks his family for one gift this holiday season: to get along. If they can honor that wish and spend five days under the same roof without killing one another, it will be a Christmas miracle.

programme.title: The Butler
programme.desc: The Butler (2013) is an American historical drama directed by Lee Daniels and starring Forest Whitaker and Oprah Winfrey. At the White House an elderly butler named Cecil Gaines is waiting for the newly inaugurated president Barack Obama. While waiting, the butler recounts his life story and all the former US presidents he served. A butler's job requires keeping what you heard to yourself and doing your job unnoticed. Serving eight presidents during his tenure, Cecil observed how American society was changing and even he has felt these changes.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy starring Earl Cave (son of singer Nick) as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum, in Simon Bird's (The Inbetweeners) debut feature in the director's chair. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Can a Metallica-loving, black-clad teenager with Tippexed emblems on his shoes have any fun with a middle-aged librarian who wears comfortable sandals? Well, she is his mum... Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.

programme.desc: France. End of the 19th century. Louise Violet, a Parisian teacher, is sent on a mission to the French countryside. She has to impose the free, compulsory and secular school of the Republic.

When he forgets to pick Mercredi up from school, the director calls the social services. Severine, a social investigator, forces Denis to attend parenting classes, under penalty of withdrawing the custody of his daughters….

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism whose effects sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: Beauty And the Beast
programme.desc: A widowed merchant moves to the countryside with his six children after going bankrupt. His youngest daughter, Belle, is the only one happy with the change. When the merchant's lost ship is found, he plans to reclaim his assets. On the way, he encounters the Beast's magical domain, where his needs are met. However, he is caught picking a rose and must return to the castle or his family will be killed. Feeling responsible, Belle offers herself in her father's place.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: Waking Ned
programme.desc: The lucky winner of the national lottery is Ned Devine, so taken by his good fortune that he now can't be waked, because he died from the shock of it! News of the win spread quickly in the scenic little Irish village of Tully More, but not the secret news of Ned's demise. With lottery officials closing in to confirm the prize claimed by the deceased Devine, Ned's closest friends scheme to keep the prize money close to home, in memory of Ned of course! But as the plot twists humorously, they learn it is hard is to keep such a secret in a small town.

programme.title: God Help the Girl
programme.desc: Emily Browning, Olly Alexander, Hannah Murray and Pierre Boulanger star in first-time screenwriter-director Stuart Murdoch's romantic musical. Murdoch is lead singer and songwriter of Scottish band Belle and Sebastian, and this movie sprang from his side-project album showcasing songs about and sung by women. Browning plays (and sings) the lead role of Eve, an aspiring singer and musician who struggles with an eating disorder and depression. Attending a gig in Glasgow, Eve meets nerdy singer-songwriter James (Alexander), who works as a university lifeguard and teaches guitar. When she gets stranded in the city, he puts her up for the night and the two strike up a friendship that promises romance. They form a band with Cassie (Murray), one of James's guitar students, and together they strive to achieve their dream of stardom. But Eve's friendship with Anton (Boulanger), the frontman of up-and-coming band Wobbly-Legged Rat will cause a series of problems. With Mark Radcliffe, Stuart Maconie and Josie Long.

programme.title: The Days to Come
programme.desc: Vir and Lluis have been dating for a year now. Vir finds out she is pregnant. During the next nine months, Vir and Lluis will live all their fears, joys, expectations and realities.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: Kate (Clémence Poésy) and Justin (Stephen Campbell Moore) are expecting their first child. They also have new downstairs neighbors, Jon (David Morrissey) and Theresa (Laura Birn), who are also expecting their first baby. Kate and Justin invite Jon and Theresa for dinner so they can get acquainted. During their dinner conversation, it's revealed that Kate and Justin originally didn't want children and were together 10 years before deciding to have a baby, and conceived rather quickly thereafter. Jon and Theresa tell them they struggled for seven years to have a child, and Theresa is visibly upset that Kate got pregnant as quickly as she did while she and Jon had tried for years. Eventually, Theresa, who has been sneaking wine all evening, says she doesn't feel well and gets up to leave. In her rush to get out the door, a tipsy Theresa trips over Kate's cat and falls down the stairs and subsequently loses the baby, whom she was going to name Peter.

programme.title: Delicatessen
programme.desc: Dark comedy. French dark comedy, produced in 1991. In a post-apocalyptic society where meat is scarce, the tenants of a deserted apartment building organise cannibalistic feasts using as victims the butcher's helpers.

programme.title: Lolita
programme.desc: Controversial adaptation of Vladimir Nabokov's novel about a man's obsession with a 13-year-old girl. In an American town in the late 1940s, a European professor takes up residence in the home of a woman and her daughter. Although eventually marrying the mother, he harbours a secret desire for the young girl. And when the mother dies, the middle-aged man's infatuation with the teenager runs amok - with shocking consequences.

programme.title: The Face of Love
programme.desc: Several years after the death of her husband, a widow meets a stranger who greatly resembles her late husband, from his striking blue eyes to his kindness and humor, and falls in love with him, and, again, meets the love of her life.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: Michael Caine and Clémence Poésy star in writer-director Sandra Nettlebeck's romantic comedy-drama. Retired philosophy professor Matthew Morgan (Caine) is a non-French-speaking American living in Paris. Recently widowed, he's attempting to come to terms with the loss of his much-loved wife (Jane Alexander), with whom he has fantasy chats. One day, he meets lonely young dance teacher Pauline (Poesy) on a bus, where she helps him out of an awkward situation. It's the start of a relaxed but close friendship that rekindles his dormant interest in life. She teaches him the cha-cha and he talks to her about the great thinkers of philosophy. But his sadness about his bereavement overwhelms him and he attempts to kill himself. Morgan's estranged children, Miles (Justin Kirk) and Karen (Gillian Anderson), turn up from America. They're both worried and angry about their father and his new friendship, not least because they believe Pauline might be a gold-digger. Network premiere.

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons
programme.desc: Four children dream of escaping the tedium of a summer holiday with their mother. When finally given permission to camp on their own on an island in the middle of a vast lake in the Lake District, they are overjoyed. But when they get there they discover they may not be alone. The battle for ownership of a lonely island teaches them the skills of survival, the value of friendship and the importance of holding your nerve. Based on the novel by Arthur Ransome.

Daniel (Cave) is all set for six weeks in Florida with his dad and his dad's pregnant wife, Bernie. The weather will be fantastic, and he'll get to drive his father's MG convertible. So, when Bernie calls to say that Daniel won't be able to come to Florida, Daniel is obviously not very happy. Also starring Tamsin Greig and Rob Brydon. Network Premiere.
